backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for RailMutual Connect that manages user profiles with CRUD operations, search/filtering, and dashboard stats, using a mixed-in authorization system to enforce role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the end-to-end user flow (Internet Identity login → profile save → dashboard routing) to specific frontend files and components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose within the RailMutual Connect React application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the RailMutual Connect app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with public routes (landing, auth) and protected routes (dashboard, profile, matches) wrapped in an authentication-gating ProtectedLayout.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Authenticated layout shell with a sticky deep-blue navigation bar featuring logo, nav links with icons, logout button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/MatchCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying a matched employee's profile details including zone, division, and posting swap info, with a toggleable contact info section.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/updating user profiles, dashboard stats, and searching/managing transfer requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties along with utility component classes like gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page that handles Internet Identity login, registers or logs in the user via the backend actor, and redirects to profile setup or dashboard based on profile completeness.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page that displays the authenticated user's profile summary, profile completion percentage, and match count using skeleton loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page for RailMutual Connect that displays hero section, feature highlights, and how-it-works steps, routing authenticated users to the dashboard and unauthenticated users to the auth page.
frontend/src/pages/MatchesPage.tsx: Page that displays mutual transfer matches for the current user and provides a filterable search interface to find other railway employee profiles by zone, division, location, and designation.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile creation/editing form that pre-fills from existing user data and submits updates via the updateProfile mutation, then redirects to the dashboard on success.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (primary blues, oranges), typography/display fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes for the RailMutual Connect UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking known issues (broken Internet Identity auth flow, profile save permissions), pending fix requests, and existing features for the RailMutual Connect application at schema version 3.
